title: Kamal Haasan Promises Sago Industry Revival in Namakkal Rally
summary: Kamal Haasan addresses a packed public rally in Namakkal promising the revival of the sago industry, which is a major economic backbone of the district.

title: DMK's P. Rani Intensifies Door-to-Door Campaigning
summary: DMK candidate P. Rani intensifies door-to-door campaigning in Namakkal town today, focusing on women voters and welfare beneficiaries.

title: AIADMK's Sridevi Promises Better Poultry Farm Support
summary: AIADMK nominee Sridevi P. S. Mohan promises better poultry farm support and disease control labs in Namakkal constituency.

title: TVK Workers Distribute Booth Slips in Rasipuram (SC)
summary: TVK workers distribute booth slips vigorously across Rasipuram (SC) constituency as part of grassroots voter outreach.

title: BJP's Premkumar Holds Roadshow on Granite Quarry Issues
summary: BJP candidate S. D. Premkumar holds a roadshow highlighting granite quarry worker issues in Rasipuram.

title: Flying Squads Seize Unaccounted Cash in Paramathi-Velur
summary: Flying squads seize unaccounted cash during checks in Paramathi-Velur today as election enforcement intensifies.

title: DMK Vows to Resolve Tapioca Farmers' Market Woes
summary: DMK candidate in Senthamangalam (ST) vows to resolve tapioca farmers' market woes through new cold storage facilities.

title: NTK Holds Voter Awareness in Kolli Hills Tribal Areas
summary: NTK activists organise voter awareness meetings in remote Kolli Hills tribal areas to ensure no eligible voter is left out.

title: Vijay's TVK Campaign Vehicle Tours Kumarapalayam
summary: Vijay's TVK campaign vehicle tours Kumarapalayam stressing youth employment and skill development promises.

title: Paramilitary Deployed in Sensitive Senthamangalam Booths
summary: Paramilitary forces have been deployed at sensitive polling booths in Senthamangalam (ST) ahead of polling day.

title: Home Voting Arranged for Elderly in Rasipuram
summary: Home voting facility arranged for elderly and differently-abled voters in Rasipuram constituency.

title: MCC Violation Filed Against Independent in Kolli Hills
summary: Flying squads booked a model code violation case against an independent candidate in Kolli Hills.

title: Observer Visits EVM Randomization Centre
summary: Election observer visits the EVM randomization centre in Namakkal district headquarters to verify the process.

title: Postal Ballot Applications Surge from NRIs in Tiruchengode
summary: Postal ballot applications surge among NRIs from Tiruchengode constituency, reflecting high diaspora engagement.

title: AIADMK Addresses Bird Flu Concerns of Poultry Farmers
summary: AIADMK holds a public meeting addressing poultry farmers' bird flu concerns in Namakkal.

title: DMK Promises Skill Centres for Powerloom Youth
summary: DMK candidate P. Rani promises skill training centres for powerloom youth in Namakkal.

title: BJP Inspects Granite Quarry Worker Conditions
summary: BJP's S. D. Premkumar inspects granite quarry worker conditions in Rasipuram and promises better safety norms.

title: SVEEP Reaches Remote Senthamangalam Hamlets
summary: SVEEP programme reaches remote hamlets in Senthamangalam (ST) constituency with awareness drives.

title: Polling Personnel Training Completed in District
summary: Polling personnel training has been completed successfully across all six Namakkal constituencies.

title: TVK Pledges Modern Sago Processing Units in Mohanur
summary: TVK candidate pledges modern sago processing units in Mohanur to revive the local economy.

title: Flying Squads Seize Liquor Bottles in Rasipuram
summary: Flying squads seize illegal liquor bottles during checks in Rasipuram under model code enforcement.

title: EVM Commissioning Underway in Namakkal Constituencies
summary: Election officials in Namakkal have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.

title: DMK Intensifies Final-Phase Outreach in Namakkal
summary: DMK candidates and alliance workers have intensified door-to-door outreach across Namakkal, focusing on welfare scheme beneficiaries and first-time voters.

title: SVEEP Street Plays Boost Voter Awareness in Namakkal
summary: SVEEP teams in Namakkal performed street plays at bus stands and markets to encourage 100% voter turnout on April 23.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Vehicle Checks in Namakkal
summary: Flying squads in Namakkal have intensified vehicle checks at major entry points and highway intersections to curb illegal cash movement.

title: Namakkal Reports Smooth Progress on Postal Ballot Distribution
summary: District election officials confirmed that postal ballot distribution to service voters and senior citizens in Namakkal is progressing as per schedule.

title: AIADMK Holds Booth-Level Worker Meetings in Namakkal
summary: AIADMK held booth-level worker meetings across Namakkal to finalize polling-day strategy and voter mobilization plans.

title: Namakkal Colleges Host Voter Pledge Programs
summary: Colleges across Namakkal hosted voter pledge programs for first-time voters, accompanied by mock EVM demonstrations.

title: Namakkal Static Surveillance Teams Report Daily to Observers
summary: Static surveillance teams in Namakkal are reporting daily to election observers on cash, liquor, and freebie movement.

title: Strong Rooms Sealed in Namakkal After Final Randomization
summary: EVM strong rooms across Namakkal have been sealed under multi-tier security following the final randomization of polling personnel.

title: BJP Highlights Central Schemes During Namakkal Roadshow
summary: BJP candidates conducted a roadshow in Namakkal highlighting central government welfare schemes and infrastructure investments.

title: Booth Slip Distribution Crosses Halfway Mark in Namakkal
summary: Door-to-door booth slip distribution in Namakkal has crossed the halfway mark, with BLOs targeting full coverage by April 18.

title: MCC Violation Notices Issued in Namakkal Constituencies
summary: Several model code of conduct violation notices have been issued in Namakkal constituencies for unauthorised hoardings and campaign material.

title: Namakkal Collector Reviews Polling Station Readiness
summary: The District Collector held a review meeting with returning officers in Namakkal to assess polling station readiness, water supply, and accessibility ramps.

summary: TVK cadre led by local coordinators stepped up the door-to-door campaign across Namakkal, distributing pamphlets and party manifestos.

title: Namakkal Administration Installs Awareness Hoardings
summary: The Namakkal district administration has installed voter awareness hoardings at major junctions, urging citizens to exercise their franchise.

title: Namakkal Police Beef Up Security at Sensitive Booths
summary: Namakkal district police have beefed up security at sensitive booths with paramilitary deployment and additional patrol vehicles.

title: Mock Polls Demonstrated to Candidates in Namakkal
summary: Mock polls were demonstrated to candidate representatives in Namakkal as part of EVM transparency measures before the April 23 election.

title: Congress Workers Hold Street-Corner Meetings in Namakkal
summary: Congress alliance workers held street-corner meetings in Namakkal to highlight the alliance's promises on education and healthcare.

summary: The state voter helpline has seen a spike in calls from Namakkal, mostly enquiring about polling station details and voter slip status.

summary: A significant liquor seizure was reported during routine election-related checks in Namakkal, and the contraband has been impounded.

summary: Booth-level officers in Namakkal have concluded the final voter list verification, ensuring electoral roll accuracy ahead of polling.

summary: Differently-abled voters in Namakkal are receiving dedicated transport and assistance arrangements from the district election office.

summary: Income Tax teams have been conducting discreet surveys in Namakkal to track unaccounted financial flows linked to the election period.
